changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.site_information WHERE name = 'Accession number prefix' AND domain_id IS NULL

changeSet.comment: Re-associates the 'Accession number prefix' site_information row with the siteIdentity domain so it appears under Admin > General Configuration > Site Information. The dev-init siteInfo.sql INSERT omitted domain_id, leaving the row orphaned; properties-file round-trip still worked because that path queries by name, but the admin menu (inner-join on domain) filtered the row out.

update.where: name = 'Accession number prefix' AND domain_id IS NULL
